creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
(In reply to Neal Nelson from comment #3)

> I don't see the reason for the change in the comment however. 
> It is "The" Nim language after all. The article is required in English.

The change was done to pet portlint. Thats the only reason for the rework and could be undone. 

Should i undone it?

If you are fine with the patch please set the maintainer-flag. If you want me do change the comment back please set the feedback to "-" and i will update the patch. :)

Greetings,
Torsten
